summary: Verified all 6 pre-App-Store refinements for CarryOn estate planning app. All items PASS: (1) Military/First Responder and Veteran beneficiary plans have empty note fields, (2) Metric numbers use body font without fontFamily overrides, (3) Trial banner info tier uses dark blue #1B4F72, (4) Checklist complete button only shows when fromGettingStarted=true, (5) EGA header buttons are 40x40px and + button removed, (6) Support chat page uses fixed positioning

item_1_beneficiary_plans_note_removal.description: Military/First Responder and Veteran beneficiary plans should NOT have 'Flat rate — no discounts' text
item_1_beneficiary_plans_note_removal.findings: Both plans have note: '' (empty string), no 'Flat rate' text in features

item_2_font_uniformity.description: Dashboard and admin page metric numbers use body font (DM Sans), NOT Outfit or Cormorant Garamond
files_checked: DashboardPage.js lines 183, 202, 506 - no fontFamily on metric values
AdminPage.js lines 154, 159, 164 - no fontFamily on metric values
AnalyticsTab.js line 85 - no fontFamily on KPI values
LaunchMetricsTab.js lines 35, 45 - no fontFamily on metric values
item_2_font_uniformity.findings: fontFamily: 'Outfit' only applied to headers (h1, h2, h3), not to metric numbers

item_3_trial_banner_color.description: Trial banner 'days remaining' text should show dark blue #1B4F72 instead of gold for info tier
item_3_trial_banner_color.findings: info tier: { text: '#1B4F72', icon: '#2563EB' } - dark blue for light mode visibility

item_4_checklist_conditional_button.description: IAC 'Complete Checklist Editing for Now' button should only show when navigated from getting-started flow
item_4_checklist_conditional_button.findings: Button wrapped in condition: fromGettingStarted && defaultItems.length > 0. Button NOT present when navigating directly to /checklist

item_5_ega_header_buttons.description: EGA header action buttons should be larger (40x40) and + button removed
item_5_ega_header_buttons.findings: Export buttons have w-10 h-10 (40x40px verified), icons w-5 h-5 (20px). No Plus button in header - only Export Checklist PDF and Export Estate PDF buttons

item_6_support_chat_fixed_positioning.description: Support chat page should fit on one screen without scrolling using fixed positioning
item_6_support_chat_fixed_positioning.findings: Uses fixed inset-0 positioning with top: headerHeight, bottom: calc(5rem + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)). Message input visible within viewport

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 requested refinements are properly implemented and verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 pre-App-Store refinements verified: (1) ben_military and ben_veteran plans have empty note, (2) metric numbers have no fontFamily overrides, (3) trial banner info tier uses dark blue #1B4F72, (4) checklist button conditional on fromGettingStarted state, (5) EGA header buttons 40x40px with + removed, (6) support chat uses fixed positioning. Rate limiting may occur during repeated login attempts.
